title: Baked Hake with Egyptian Spices
description: A flavorful Italian-inspired dish featuring hake baked with aromatic Egyptian spices and herbs.
instructions: Rinse the hake fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the hake with salt and pepper.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the asparagus and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Transfer the asparagus to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Place the hake fillets on the baking sheet with the asparagus.
Sprinkle the Egyptian spice blend and cumin over the hake.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until the hake is cooked through.
Serve the baked hake with roasted asparagus and enjoy!
